div.class: align-self-start w-auto end-0 mt-2 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-end gap-2 o_presence_status_pill_wrapper

field.name: hr_icon_display
field.invisible: not show_hr_icon_display or not id or not active

div.class: d-flex align-items-center border rounded-pill px-3 py-1 bg-white border-secondary-subtle

group.string: Phương thức làm việc trong tuần

field.name: additional_note
field.placeholder: Provide additional information about this version...

div.class: o_hr_skills_editable o_hr_skills_group o_hr_column o_group_resume col-lg-7 d-flex flex-column
col-lg-6 w-100 mt-4 mb-3 o_horizontal_separator text-uppercase fw-bolder small d-flex

button.name: %(hr.hr_version_wizard_action)d
button.class: btn btn-link ms-auto text-end lh-1 h-100 p-0

field.name: structure_type_id
field.placeholder: Employee will be excluded from Pay Runs

field.name: resource_calendar_id
field.help: The default working hours are set in configuration.

field.name: user_id
field.context: { 'default_create_employee_id': id, 'default_name': name, 'default_phone': work_phone, 'default_mobile': mobile_phone, 'default_login': work_email, 'default_partner_id': work_contact_id, 'search_default_filter_no_share': 1, }

field.name: user_id
field.context: { 'default_create_employee_id': id, 'default_name': name, 'default_phone': work_phone, 'default_mobile': mobile_phone, 'default_login': work_email, 'default_partner_id': work_contact_id, 'search_default_filter_no_share': 1, }

div.class: col-md-4 d-flex flex-column align-items-center gap-4 mb-4
col-md-4 d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-center gap-4 mb-4
col-md-4 d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-center gap-4 mb-4
